products.name: Trader Joe’s snacks bundle
products.description: A flexible snack bundle from Trader Joe’s. Final items depend on availability.
products.description_zh: Trader Joe’s 零食組合，實際款式視乎現場供應。

products.name: Sephora beauty request
products.description: Send product link or screenshot. We confirm final price before purchase.
products.description_zh: 你可以提交產品連結或截圖，我哋購買前會先確認最終價錢。

products.name: Limited souvenir pickup
products.description: For small souvenirs, postcards, merch, or local finds.
products.description_zh: 適合小手信、明信片、周邊、本地特色小物。
